items.title: "We Knew How to Beat LeBron" – Inside the 2011 Finals Game Plan
items.body_excerpt: Caron Butler takes us inside the Mavs' locker room during the 2011 NBA Finals the zone defense game plan built to stop Dwyane Wade, force LeBron James into jumpers, and wear him down. He relives the moment on the bench when LeBron passed up the shot and he knew Miami was done.…

items.title: T-Mac Tested Clippers Rookie Keaton Wagler... He Passed 👀🏀 | Cousins

items.body_excerpt: T-Mac gave Clippers rookie Keaton Wagler a test ... and it's safe to say he passed. 💯👏 "That just shows me that you actually watch the game of basketball. Typically — in this new era of hoopers — they don't watch the game." #NBA #basketball #rookie #clippers #LA #losangeles…
